channel.title: Space on Silvano DAL ZILIO
channel.description: Recent content in Space on Silvano DAL ZILIO

item.title: Japetus
item.author: dalzilio [at] laas [dot] fr (Silvano DAL ZILIO)
item.description:
Jan 2022 — Oct 2025.

The JAPETUS project, funded by France Relance and CNES, aims to demonstrate the feasibility of a hyper-reactive Earth observation solution based on a constellation of nanosatellites. The project relies on several major innovations, including mission planning algorithms tailored to the project’s specific constraints.

item.title: Formal Approach for the Verification of Onboard Autonomous Functions in Observation Satellites
item.author: dalzilio [at] laas [dot] fr (Silvano DAL ZILIO)
item.description:
Vincent Mussot, Silvano Dal Zilio, Loïc Correnson, Serge Rainjonneau, Yves Bardout, Grégoire Scano
In ERTSS 2020 — 10th International Congress and Exhibition on Embedded Real-Time Software and Systems, jan 2020.
